zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinster於1145年4月26日出生在愛爾蘭萊音斯特時，她的父親Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland36歲，母親Mór Ní Tuathail31歲。她於1170年8月26日與Richard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembroke在愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1188年8月26日在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德沃特福德享年43歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinster于1145年4月26日出生在爱尔兰萊音斯特时，她的父亲Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland36岁，母亲Mór Ní Tuathail31岁。她于1170年8月26日与Richard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembroke在爱尔兰迪 本 度布林结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1188年8月26日在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德沃特福德享年43岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

nameMeanings.name: MacMurrough
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form (in Leinster) of Mac Murchadha ‘son of Murchadh’, a personal name meaning ‘sea warrior’. The spelling gh indicates the original guttural fricative sound of the internal -ch-. Elsewhere, in Roscommon and Tyrone, the usual Anglicized form was Murphy (the same phonetic change as in English laugh, cough etc.). Diarmait Mac Murchadha (Dermot McMurrough) was intermittently king of Leinster from 1126–71. After being deposed in 1166 he requested help from Henry II to reclaim his kingdom, which resulted in the Norman invasion of Ireland in 1169 under the leadership of Richard de Clare, Earl of Pembroke (known as ‘Strongbow’), an event that brought many Anglo-Norman surnames to Ireland. A powerful Irish family of this lineage were also known as Kavanagh , after Dermot's son.

Anglicized form (in Leinster) of Mac Murchadha ‘son of Murchadh’, a personal name meaning ‘sea warrior’. A powerful family of this name were also known as Kavanagh . The spelling gh indicates the original guttural fricative sound of the internal -ch-. Elsewhere (especially in Roscommon and Tyrone) the usual Anglicized form of the Irish name was Murphy .

variants.name: Murphy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Aileen, Kieran, Brigid, Donal, Siobhan, Eamon, Aidan, Dermot, John Patrick, Declan.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murchadha ‘descendant of Murchadh’, a personal name composed of the elements muir ‘sea’ + cath ‘battle’, i.e. ‘sea warrior’. This was an important family in Tyrone. For the surname with mac, see also McMurrough (Leinster).

nameMeanings.name: Aoife
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a derivative of aoibh ‘beauty’ ( compare Aoibheann ), but it has also been associated with Esuvia, a Gaulish goddess. It was borne by several different heroines in ancient Irish legend, and in historical times by a daughter of King Dermot of Leinster, who married Richard de Clare, Earl of Pembroke, leader of the Anglo-Norman incursion into Ireland of 1169 . It has sometimes been Anglicized as Eva.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinster was born on 26 April 1145, in Leinster, Ireland, her father, Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland, was 36 and her mother, Mór Ní Tuathail, was 31. She married Richard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembroke on 26 August 1170, in Diocese of Dublin, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 26 August 1188, in Waterford, County Waterford, Ireland, at the age of 43, and was buried in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinster est née le 26 avril 1145, à Leinster, Irlande, son père, Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mór Ní Tuathail, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Richard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembroke le 26 août 1170, à Diocese of Dublin, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 août 1188, à Waterford, County Waterford, Irlande, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinster am 26. April 1145 in Leinster, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland 36 und ihre Mutter Mór Ní Tuathail 31. Sie hat am 26. August 1170 in Diocese of Dublin, Irland Richard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembroke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. August 1188 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Waterford, County Waterford, Irland und wurde in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinster è nata il il 26 aprile 1145 nel Leinster, Irlanda, sua padre, Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Mór Ní Tuathail, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Richard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembroke il 26 agosto 1170, nel Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 agosto 1188, nel Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinsterが1145年4月26日にアイルランドレインスターで生まれた時，父Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Irelandは36歳，母Mór Ní Tuathailは31歳であった。1170年8月26日にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリンでRichard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembrokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1188年8月26日にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードワテルフォードで43歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinster(이)가 1145년 4월 26일 아일랜드 레인스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mór Ní Tuathail(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1170년 8월 26일 아일랜드 디오스스 프 드블린에서 Richard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembroke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1188년 8월 26일 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 왓르퍼드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에 묻혔다.

pt.26 April 1145–26 August 1188: 26 de abril de 1145–26 de agosto de 1188
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinster nasceu em 26 de abril de 1145, em Leinster, Irlanda, seu pai, Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mór Ní Tuathail, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembroke em 26 de agosto de 1170, em Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1188, em Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinster родилась 26 апреля 1145 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mór Ní Tuathail, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembroke 26 августа 1170 г. в местности диосес оф дублинь, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 августа 1188 г. в местности вэитирфорд, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.26 April 1145–26 August 1188: 26 de abril de 1145–26 de agosto de 1188
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess Aoife MacMurrough of Leinster nació el 26 de abril de 1145, en Leinster, Irlanda, su papá, Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mór Ní Tuathail, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Richard II de Clare 2nd Earl of Pembroke el 26 de agosto de 1170, en Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1188, en Waterford, County Waterford, Irlanda, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
